records.ptx_feature: PTX ISA 6.5 minimum; CUDA 13.3 emits PTX 9.3

stages.representation: convergent register-only inline PTX for m8n8k16 signed INT8 MMA
stages.detail: The isolated m8 floor probe produced 11,109-byte compute_75 NVVM IR with SHA-256 8658db3fa9259db3b16856d2012d413ad6efcf2120c5df7e6fbcc0a0801b4406 and 4,948-byte LTOIR with SHA-256 eb153d1b19d2c770389d5e9ab503f524f3bd220052e56980b3a3134f356b6613.

stages.representation: isolated dense m8 INT8 register-MMA floor kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 3,240-byte cubin with SHA-256 f731151e06c4c452de06d36d4aeb627e6f8e2597ba015a8fc53f58f4956dee58; cuobjdump contained all eight distinct IMMA.8816.{S8,U8}.{S8,U8}[.SAT] heads.
